lines.speaker: Pandur Hosidius
lines.text: What? Everyone knows who I am. I'm Pandur Hosidius, son of Lord Kandur Hosidius. You know him? The man who owns all this land? Well I'm his son.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are these farming patches for?

lines.speaker: Pandur Hosidius
lines.text: This is our vinery. My father's cracked the secret of viticulture, and although our climate's too cold for most grapes, we've made a working vineyard here.

lines.speaker: Pandur Hosidius
lines.text: You seem to have got yourself a decent reputation around here, so you can grow grapes if you like. Old Gallow will look after them for you.

lines.speaker: Pandur Hosidius
lines.text: Don't get any ideas, though. We're not having just any random stranger wander in off the fields and try to grow grapes.

lines.speaker: Pandur Hosidius
lines.text: I've got to test the produce. Ever since I was a child, I've been the official tester for the bacon, the beef, the pies, the beer, everything. Now there's wine!

sections.title: After the completion of A Kingdom Divided

lines.speaker: Lord Pandur Hosidius
lines.text: Ohh, I know you. You're the one that helped father take the throne! Of course, now it's my brothers throne instead.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Which I'm guessing makes you the new Lord Hosidius? How's that going?

lines.speaker: Lord Pandur Hosidius
lines.text: Boring! Things were much more fun when my only job was to taste the wine and get drunk.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You still seem to be enjoying the wine just fine.

lines.speaker: Lord Pandur Hosidius
lines.text: Yes, but now I have to do other things as well.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It must be very hard for you.

lines.speaker: Lord Pandur Hosidius
lines.text: It is. Now, if you'll excuse me, I'm going to have another drink.
